mission: 把当前 Unity 项目 (kitten-crypto-mining-ventures) 完整迁移到 Godot 4.3+，使用 GDScript 重写。用户已授权删除 Unity 文件（Assets/, ProjectSettings/, Packages/ 等），但删除必须放在最后一个 phase 单独成 commit 便于 revert。详细计划见 /Users/jacksonc/.claude/plans/elegant-bubbling-steele.md，包含 7 个 phase、目录结构、Unity→Godot 映射表、验证标准。

sprints.direction: Execute Phase 1 + Phase 2 of the Unity→Godot migration plan at /Users/jacksonc/.claude/plans/elegant-bubbling-steele.md. Create Godot 4.3+ project skeleton (project.godot with autoloads, InputMap, display 1920x1080, gl_compatibility renderer; directory structure scenes/ scripts/autoload scripts/models scripts/systems scripts/ui scripts/utils scripts/constants data/ assets/), copy Assets/StreamingAssets/*.json to data/, implement GDScript models (player.gd, building.gd, graphic_card.gd, grid_position.gd, resource_ref.gd, general_event.gd) as extends RefCounted with from_dict/to_dict, implement autoload/data_manager.gd (load res://data/*.json at _ready, save to user:// on exit) and autoload/player_manager.gd (per-second money/volt tick using native Tween replacing DOTween). Create minimal main.tscn with a Label showing current money that increments every second. Must NOT delete any Unity files in this sprint. Verification: godot --headless --quit exits 0 on the new project.
commits: 69d82c3 feat: add godot 4 project skeleton with data layer
c504ed6 bug: setup money text and volt text for player manager
9d758d2 bug: Scene Fix bug that caused shadows to follow the screen zoom instead of the buttons when the game was zooming
sprints.summary: Created Godot 4 project skeleton per Phase 1+2 of the migration plan: project.godot (autoloads, InputMap, 1920x1080, gl_compatibility), directory scaffold, copied 5 JSON data files from StreamingAssets, GDScript models with from_dict/to_dict, DataManager and PlayerManager autoloads (per-second money tick via native Tween), and minimal main.tscn with live money Label. Unity tree left intact. Single commit 69d82c3 on auto/session-1776900091-sprint-1. Godot binary not installed locally so --headless verification deferred; JSON sanity-check path used instead.

sprints.direction: Execute Phase 3 of Unity→Godot migration (plan: /Users/jacksonc/.claude/plans/elegant-bubbling-steele.md). Port core gameplay to GDScript autoloads in scripts/autoload/: building_manager.gd (loads buildings from data/buildings.json via DataManager, exposes current_building, per-second money/volt contribution from placed cards), graphic_card_manager.gd (loads graphiccards.json, instantiate/track cards, quantity tracking), animation_manager.gd (fade in/out via native Tween), menu_manager.gd (scene transitions via get_tree().change_scene_to_file), pop_log_manager.gd, item_manager.gd. Create scripts/systems/grid_placement_system.gd (TileMap-based with cell indicator, mouse local_to_map, valid/invalid feedback) and scripts/systems/input_manager.gd (uses existing InputMap actions placement_confirm/placement_cancel). Create scripts/systems/building_scene_generator.gd that switches buildings by showing/hiding a Node2D subtree (NOT dynamic scene creation). Create scenes/building.tscn template (Node2D + TileMap + Camera2D with smoothing enabled + cell_indicator placeholder). Integrate building_manager into main.tscn so the current building loads and player sees money accumulate from placed cards. Do NOT touch UI menus (Phase 4) or delete Unity files (Phase 6). Translate Unity→Godot API faithfully: Time.deltaTime→_process(delta), Instantiate→PackedScene.instantiate, static singletons→autoload.

Execute Phase 4 of Unity→Godot migration (plan: /Users/jacksonc/.claude/plans/elegant-bubbling-steele.md). Create all UI scenes and scripts in GDScript. Create: scenes/main_menu.tscn (Control root with VBoxContainer + Buttons: Start/Store/Settings/Quit — wire signals to menu_manager autoload), scenes/store.tscn (StoreMenu with ScrollContainer → GridContainer of StoreItemSlot instances populated from graphic_card_manager), scenes/ui/store_item_slot.tscn (Button + icon TextureRect + labels for name/price/earn/volt, emits purchase signal), scenes/settings.tscn (resolution dropdown, volume sliders, back button), scenes/ui/cell_indicator.tscn (ColorRect with semi-transparent tint for grid placement preview — used by existing grid_placement_system.gd), scenes/ui/esc_window.tscn (CenterContainer + Panel + Resume/Settings/Quit). Create: scripts/ui/main_menu.gd, scripts/ui/store_menu.gd (instantiates slots, handles purchase flow via graphic_card_manager), scripts/ui/storage_menu.gd (lists owned cards), scripts/ui/store_item_slot.gd, scripts/ui/settings_window.gd, scripts/ui/esc_window.gd, scripts/ui/buttons/ with start_button.gd, exit_button.gd, quit_button.gd, set_button.gd. Set main_menu.tscn as the project's run/main scene (update project.godot run/main_scene). Use Godot's native Label + TextureRect + Button, no TextMeshPro equivalent needed — default font OK. Do NOT delete Unity files. Do NOT modify existing autoloads except to add missing signals/methods called by UI.

Execute Phase 5 of Unity→Godot migration (plan: /Users/jacksonc/.claude/plans/elegant-bubbling-steele.md). Copy art assets from Unity project into Godot-compatible locations. Specifically: (1) Copy all PNG/JPG files from Assets/Resources/Artwork/ (and any subdirs) into assets/art/ preserving subdirectory structure; NEVER copy .meta files. (2) Copy .aseprite source files to assets/sprites/_source/ (archival; Godot ignores them). (3) For each referenced sprite in graphiccards.json (field Sprite/Icon path), create a corresponding .png at assets/art/cards/ (copy from existing Artwork PNG if name matches, otherwise leave an empty 1x1 placeholder so the store UI doesn't crash). (4) Create assets/tilesets/README.md explaining that the TileSet must be authored interactively in Godot editor (TileMap + TileSet resources need human-authored atlas configuration); do NOT try to generate .tres TileSet files programmatically. (5) Wire store_item_slot.gd to load icons via load("res://assets/art/cards/" + card.icon_name + ".png") with a null-safe fallback. (6) Add assets/fonts/README.md explaining default font is used (no action needed). (7) Do NOT delete any Unity files. (8) Do NOT modify core gameplay code beyond the narrow store_item_slot icon loader tweak above. Report exact file counts copied and any art files referenced in JSON that are missing from the source tree.
